scripts.test:marketplace: node --test scripts/marketplace-sync/normalize.test.js src/services/marketplaceImport.test.js src/services/googleSheets.test.js src/services/firebaseScans.test.js src/services/scanCommit.test.js src/services/orderRecovery.test.js src/services/firestorePagination.test.js src/services/cameraLoader.test.js src/services/sheetSyncReconciliation.test.js api/sheet-lock.test.js
scripts.firebase:deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.firebase:preview: npm run build && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 7d
scripts.firebase:serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only hosting
